expected: Coordinator reads issue #42 via gh, determines if structured breakdown exists, dispatches task-planner if needed, then plan-reviewer, then code-implementer through full pipeline to code-reviewer, then commits with Refs #42.

prompt_description: parallel mode with two issues, plan-reviewer may reject parallelization
expected: Reads both issues, dispatches task-planner for each, plan-reviewer approves/rejects parallel groups, if approved runs parallel implementers with patch proposal flow, applies patches in order, runs gates per slice/group, commits each work item separately if no file overlap.

prompt: /subagent-pipeline --no-plan --no-commit "Add input validation to the email field in UserForm"
expected: Skips task-planner. If 'Add input validation...' lacks all six structured fields → BLOCKED. If sufficient, dispatches code-implementer directly, runs full pipeline, skips commit, returns READY_FOR_COMMIT with commit plan.
